completed_tasks.name: Workspace-wide console layout and density pass
Shared control polish (popover layering, heights, modal placement)
Customer-management auto filters and modal detail flows

remaining_tasks.name: Run broader UI QA on the webpack dev server and decide the next polish slice
Optionally clear the Turbopack Windows junction issue before rerunning Playwright through Turbopack

blockers: pnpm playwright test tests/e2e/home.spec.ts still fails when it depends on the local Turbopack dev server because Next 16 cannot recreate .next/dev/node_modules/better-sqlite3-* junctions on Windows (os error 145).

decisions.decision: Keep detail-heavy customer, sales, and receivable views in modal flows instead of persistent side panels.
decisions.rationale: This preserves table width and keeps the main operational list visible.
The page can keep server-rendered selected-customer data authoritative while staying refresh-safe.

decisions.decision: Use auto-apply filter bars instead of apply/reset buttons on operational list screens.
decisions.rationale: It matches the faster console workflow the user requested.

next_action: Run a broader cross-menu QA pass on the current webpack dev server, then choose between final UI polish and Turbopack environment cleanup.
context_notes: The workspace layout pass, customer-management modal conversion, dashboard filter additions, and shared control layering/height fixes are in place and verified manually in the browser.
